# sequence are from live paper Gateway behavior on 2026-04-13.

server next_valid_id {"order_id":61}

client place_order {"order_id":"61","action":"BUY","total_quantity":"1","order_type":"LMT","lmt_price":"309.6","tif":"IOC","account":"DU9000001"}
